scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/shared build && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/api dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/web dev"
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/web typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/shared build && corepack pnpm -r test
scripts.coverage: corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/shared build && corepack pnpm -r coverage
scripts.coverage:api: corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/api coverage
scripts.coverage:web: corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @aisstream/web coverage
scripts.check: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
